name: sec-review-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace distributing sec-review: a cybersecurity audit plugin with a top-tier domain-expert subagent and live-CVE-enriched review skill for web services and servers.

plugins.name: sec-review
plugins.description: Six-agent cybersecurity review pipeline (sec-expert + finding-triager + cve-enricher + sast-runner + dast-runner + report-writer, model-pinned for cost efficiency). Analyzes a project against top-tier security expertise (DB, framework, webserver including Windows/IIS, proxy, frontend, auth, TLS, container, secrets, supply-chain), live CVE feeds (NVD, OSV, GHSA) with CISA KEV cross-reference, an opt-in SAST adapter that invokes semgrep + bandit, and an opt-in DAST lane that invokes OWASP ZAP baseline against a supplied target URL. Ships with per-run token-cost accounting and offline-drill harnesses that prove the pipeline degrades gracefully when CVE feeds, SAST tools, or DAST tools are unreachable. Produces a prioritized markdown report with cited, reliable fixes.
